title: Stan616's Build pack
description: This is a pack of all the mods that Stan616 uses to build !
body:
This is a pack of all the mods that Stan616 uses to build !
since so many people ask for his mod list all the time, i thought it would be easier if they just had a one click download.
i will try and maintain this as much as i can.

i have included Fancy menus, cause idk, spice it up, still learning how to works but i wanna add some stan themed stuff to the main menu. if u find it unnecessary u can easily just delete it from the mods folder.
